title: Parole Board Strategy 2025-28
body: "The Strategy, which you can read in full above, sets out our aims and priorities to take us to 2028.  The Strategy builds on the enormous amount of work which has been undertaken over the last five years, including implementing the changes in the Victims and Prisoners Act, reducing delays in the parole system, reducing queues for prisoners awaiting paper reviews, welcoming and training new members and piloting victims’ observations of private oral hearings.  "
